_comment: Cleanup-PR ancestry record. Per cleanup_audit.md §5 + PR-D iter 1 P2-002 fix + iter 2 PRD2-P2-001 fix (full 40-char SHAs to avoid abbreviation ambiguity). Populated manually from `git rev-parse` since the dependency-recorder bot-workflow was deferred per PR-D scope decision. Each pr<id>_merge_commit_sha is the direct-commit SHA on polaris (since cleanup PRs were direct-pushed by Claude in one session, not opened as PRs). cleanup_pr_ancestry_check.yml uses these SHAs to verify linear DAG ancestry on any future cleanup-PR reopen.
